category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Argentina market access through SRT, IRAM-adopted EN 149, and in-country import rules.

title.en: China-to-Argentina PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入阿根廷（FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入阿根廷（FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator documentation (GB 2626 / GB 19083) against Argentina entry requirements: SRT occupational safety control, IRAM adoption of EN 149, local importer obligations at Argentine ports, S-mark electrical safety where applicable, ENACOM boundary for radio-enabled products, and labelling/claims controls.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（GB 2626 / GB 19083）文件与阿根廷准入要求对照，涵盖SRT职业安全监管、IRAM采纳EN 149、阿根廷口岸进口商责任、适用场景下的S标志电气安全、无线功能产品的ENACOM边界、以及标签与用途声明控制。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（GB 2626 / GB 19083）文件與阿根廷准入要求對照，涵蓋SRT職業安全監管、IRAM採納EN 149、阿根廷口岸進口商責任、適用場景下的S標誌電氣安全、無線功能產品的ENACOM邊界，以及標籤與用途聲明控制。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, regulatory determination, customs ruling, or official importer registration service. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Argentina SRT, IRAM, Secretaria de Comercio, and customs practice with qualified professionals before shipment or placing PPE on the Argentine market. There is no general Argentine horizontal regime equivalent to EU RoHS, battery-regulation, or outdoor-noise marking.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、监管裁定、海关裁定或进口商注册服务。出口商、进口商及经销商在出货或将PPE投放阿根廷市场前应与合格专业人士核验当前SRT、IRAM、商务秘书处和海关实务。阿根廷目前不存在等同欧盟RoHS、蓄电池管理和户外噪音统一标识的横向制度。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、法規裁定、海關裁定或進口商註冊服務。出口商、進口商及經銷商在出貨或將PPE投放阿根廷市場前應與合格專業人士核驗當前SRT、IRAM、商務秘書處及海關實務。阿根廷目前不存在等同歐盟RoHS、電池管理和戶外噪音統一標識的橫向制度。

answer_first.en: Occupational respirators for worker protection are normally assessed through SRT-referenced workplace safety obligations and IRAM-adopted technical routes, with local importer (CUIT) involvement at Buenos Aires and Zarate. If the model is electrically powered, Argentine entry also requires the S-safety mark process under Secretaria de Comercio safety certification. Medical masks follow ANMAT medical-device pathways. Chinese GB 2626 / GB 19083 marks are not a direct substitute for Argentina mandatory routes.
answer_first.zh: 用于工人防护的过滤式呼吸器通常按SRT关联的职业安全义务和IRAM采纳技术路线处理，并在阿根廷口岸（布宜诺斯艾利斯/萨拉塔）由持有CUIT的本地进口商主办进口。若属带电辅助产品，还需按商务秘书处规定完成S标志入境前认证。医用口罩则按ANMAT医疗器械路径处理。中国GB 2626/GB 19083认证或标识不能直接替代阿根廷强制路径。
answer_first.zht: 用於工人防護之過濾式呼吸器通常按與SRT相關的職業安全義務及IRAM採納技術路徑處理，並在阿根廷口岸（布宜諾斯艾利斯／薩拉塔）由持有CUIT的本地進口商主辦進口。若屬帶電輔助產品，亦需遵循商務秘書處規定完成S標誌入境前認證。醫用口罩則依ANMAT醫療器械路徑處理。中國GB 2626 / GB 19083認證或標識不能直接取代阿根廷強制路徑。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Each row must include publisher, official URL, accessed date, verification flag, and updated last_verified. Rows must separately address ENACOM radio boundaries and the absence of EU-style horizontal regimes. Cross-regulatory statements must be explicit: SRT route, ANMAT route, and any in-country electrical-safety S-mark scope.
